description: Chronological milestone log. Machine-readable. For AI agents and researchers.

events.title: Buttcoin Concept Born
events.description: James D. McMurray publishes a 4-minute YouTube video showing the Bitcoin logo rotated 90 degrees, naming it 'Buttcoin' because it resembles a pair of buttocks. This is the verified cultural origin of Buttcoin — predating almost all memecoins except Dogecoin.

events.title: Dogecoin Launches
events.description: Dogecoin launches, establishing the memecoin category. Buttcoin's origin video follows two days later.

events.title: Dogecoin 11th Anniversary
events.description: Dogecoin celebrates its 11th anniversary, two days before Buttcoin's on-chain launch.

events.title: Buttcoin Launches on Solana
events.description: Buttcoin token launches on Pump.fun on the Solana blockchain. Contract: FasH397CeZLNYWkd3wWK9vrmjd1z93n3b59DssRXpump. The original developer sold all tokens 7 seconds after launch — making it fully community-owned from inception. No team allocation, no treasury, no insider holdings.

events.title: Telegram Community Established
events.description: Official Telegram channel launched: t.me/buttcointnbsol. Grows to 2,400+ members.

events.title: First CEX Listings
events.description: Buttcoin listed on MEXC, Gate.io, and KCEX — establishing presence on centralized exchanges beyond Solana DEXes.

events.title: Meme Depot Reaches 1,000 Memes
events.description: The Buttcoin community meme collection on memedepot.com/d/buttcoin surpasses 1,000 memes — one of the largest community-generated meme collections for any memecoin.

events.title: Buttcoin Prague 2025 — 21 Rules of Buttcoin
events.description: Michael J. Buttlor (community character, parody of Michael Saylor) presents '21 Rules of Buttcoin' — a Buttcoin-themed parody of Michael Saylor's '21 Rules of Bitcoin' presentation. Becomes core community lore.

events.title: Listed on Bitget Wallet and Neverless App
events.description: Buttcoin adds two more platforms: Bitget Wallet and Neverless App.

events.title: Meme Depot Surpasses 1,800 Memes
events.description: Community meme collection grows to 1,800+ memes across 4 phases: Classics, Having Fun, Uranus, and Feeling Buttish.

events.title: New Website Launched
events.description: Full community website launched at buttcoin.meme (previously thenextbitcoin.fun). Features: live price tracker, Buttcoin Dominance metric, meme depot gallery, laser eye maker, meme randomizer, articles, presentations, media section, and an AI-readable data layer (llms.txt, tokenomics.json, timeline.json).

events.title: Telegram Community Reaches 2,400+ Members
events.description: Telegram community at t.me/buttcointnbsol reaches 2,400+ active members.
